title: The Runaway Racehorse
desc: A champion racehorse named Whirlaway vanishes the night before a big race — but who wanted him to lose? 🐎

q.en: What is the name of the racehorse in the story?
q.zh: 故事里那匹赛马叫什么名字？

explain.en: The famous racehorse the kids come to watch is named Whirlaway, and he is set to race the next day.
explain.zh: 孩子们前来观看的著名赛马名叫旋风（Whirlaway），它本来要在第二天参加比赛。

q.en: Who is Sunny in the story?

explain.en: Sunny is the blond jockey in riding boots who is supposed to ride Whirlaway in the big race.
explain.zh: 桑尼是金发、穿着马靴的骑师，本来要在大赛里骑旋风出战。

q.en: What happens to Whirlaway the night before the big race?
q.zh: 大赛前一晚，旋风发生了什么事？

options.en: He gets sick at the vet
He is sold to another farm
options.zh: 他被卖给了另一个农场

explain.en: The night before the race, Whirlaway's stall is found open and the horse is gone — he has run away.
explain.zh: 比赛前一晚，旋风的马厩门开着，马不见了——他跑掉了。

q.en: Why would someone want Whirlaway to LOSE the race?
q.zh: 为什么会有人想让旋风输掉比赛？

options.en: So the culprit could bet on another horse and win money
options.zh: 这样坏人就可以押别的马赢，从而赚钱

options.en: Because the horse was too old

explain.en: If Whirlaway lost, the person who bet on a different horse would win a lot of money — that is the motive behind the crime.
explain.zh: 如果旋风输了，押别的马赢的人就能赚一大笔钱——这就是作案的动机。

q.en: What clue helps the kids follow Whirlaway?
q.zh: 孩子们靠什么线索追踪旋风？

options.zh: 一个撕破的比赛号码布

options.en: A note left by the thief
Hoofprints and bits of hay leading away
options.zh: 朝远处去的蹄印和零碎的干草

explain.en: The kids track the missing horse by following hoofprints and a trail of hay left as he was led away.
explain.zh: 孩子们顺着蹄印和一路留下的干草，追踪被带走的马。

q.en: What had someone been giving Whirlaway to make him slow?
q.zh: 有人给旋风吃了什么，让它变慢？

explain.en: Someone had been slipping the horse something to make him sleepy and slow, so he would lose the race on purpose.
explain.zh: 有人偷偷给马下药，让它昏昏欲睡、跑不快，好让它在比赛里故意输掉。

q.en: Who is Forest in the story?
q.zh: 故事里的福雷斯特（Forest）是谁？

options.en: Whirlaway's trainer who welcomes the kids
options.zh: 旋风的训练师，他迎接孩子们到来

explain.en: Forest is the horse's trainer (or owner) who greets Dink, Josh, and Ruth Rose and invites them to watch the race.
explain.zh: 福雷斯特是马的训练师（或主人），他迎接丁克、乔希和露丝·罗丝，并邀请他们来看比赛。

q.en: What do Dink, Josh, and Ruth Rose do when Whirlaway disappears?
q.zh: 旋风失踪后，丁克、乔希和露丝·罗丝做了什么？

options.en: They search for clues to find the horse and the thief
options.zh: 他们寻找线索，要找出马和贼

explain.en: Like in every A to Z Mystery, the three friends become detectives and gather clues to solve the case.
explain.zh: 和每一本A to Z Mysteries一样，三个好朋友化身小侦探，搜集线索来破案。

q.en: What kind of book is 'The Runaway Racehorse'?
q.zh: 《逃跑的赛马》是一本什么样的书？

options.zh: 一本关于会飞的马奇幻书

options.en: A mystery the three friends solve
options.zh: 一本三个好朋友破案的推理书

explain.en: It is one of the A to Z Mysteries, where Dink, Josh, and Ruth Rose solve a puzzling crime.
explain.zh: 它是A to Z Mysteries系列之一，丁克、乔希和露丝·罗丝一起破解一桩离奇的案件。

q.zh: 这个谜团最后是怎么解开的？

options.en: The horse wins the race by himself
The kids find Whirlaway and the culprit who tried to make him lose is caught
options.zh: 孩子们找到了旋风，那个想让他输掉比赛的人也被抓住了

explain.en: The friends track down Whirlaway and expose the person who tried to sabotage the horse, solving the mystery.
explain.zh: 小伙伴们找到了旋风，并揭穿了那个想破坏这匹马的人，谜团就此解开。
